name: Ernest Hemingway
abstract: Ernest Miller Hemingway ( HEM-ing-way; July 21, 1899 – July 2, 1961) was an American novelist, short-story writer, and journalist. Known for an economical, understated style that influenced later 20th-century writers, he has been romanticized for his adventurous lifestyle and outspoken, blunt public image.

works_created.t: The Paris Review: The Art of Fiction No. 21: "Group Feeling"

The Paris Review: The Art of Fiction No. 21: "Did You Even Play a Musical Instrument?"

about_quotes.speaker: Nick Mondello
about_quotes.evidence: how would Ernest Hemingway write this liner notes or album review? Well it’s going to be pretty dry.

about_quotes.speaker: James Lincoln Collier
about_quotes.evidence: while I wanted, like all of my people of my generation, you all wanted to be Ernest Hemingway
